chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P No.S-478 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 24.10.2025 None present on behalf of the petitioner. No intimation is received. On the last two dates, the case was same.. On 24.04.2024, the matter was adjourned as a last chance. It appears that the petitioner and his counsel have lost interest in pursuing the matter. Accordingly, the instant petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
